source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the circuit shown, the PNP transistor has \( \left|V_{B E}\right| = 0.7 \text{ V} \) and \( \beta = 50 \). Assume that \( R_B = 100 \text{ k} \Omega \). For \( V_0 \) to be 5 V, the value of \( R_C \) (in \( \text{k} \Omega \)) is $\qquad$

The task asks for a derived component value rather than direct lookup, indicating multi-step reasoning.
